name: finance-ev-leaders
description: Use web_search to search for 'EV market leaders Tesla BYD market share 2025 2026'. Same EV market articles from previous turn will appear. List the top 4 EV manufacturers by market share with one sentence each. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: BYD overtook Tesla as the world's top EV seller in 2025, delivering 2.25 million all-electric vehicles with a 19.3% global plug-in market share. Tesla fell to second place with 1.63 million deliveries (a 9% annual decline), hampered by brand backlash and intensifying competition. Geely surged to third with 844,630 units and a 5.6% market share, driven by triple-digit quarterly growth. Volkswagen Group rounds out the top four, leveraging its broad European lineup to maintain a significant share of the global EV market.
key_facts: BYD delivered 2.25 million BEVs in 2025, claiming the global number-one spot with ~19.3% plug-in market share
Tesla delivered 1.63 million vehicles in 2025, a 9% decline year-over-year
Geely ranked third globally with 844,630 plug-in units and 5.6% market share
BYD outsold Tesla by over 600,000 all-electric vehicles in 2025
